problem id: 2aae1021
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  00000011 -> 01100000
  00110000 -> 00000000
  10111010 -> 01000010
  00010110 -> 11000000
  00110110 -> 11000000
  11011101 -> 10100011
  11111110 -> 11000011
  11110111 -> 11100011
  01000011 -> 01100001
  00001110 -> 11000000

query: 01000010
predicted answer: 01000001
